goal: Add a side-effect-free application preflight builder that validates cockpit patch permit consume authorization is ready for later application while keeping permit consume, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready cockpit patch consume authorization can be preflighted for later application without applying it.
Application ref, operator ref, and application policy ref are required.
Permit consume and patch application remain false.
assumptions: Actual permit consumption and patch application require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing application ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-119 recorded side-effect-free cockpit patch permit consume authorization without consuming the permit.
